title: athyrium deparioides
intro: Athyrium deparioides, commonly known as Japanese Lady Fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. It is a flowering plant that is used in traditional medicine due to its health benefits, including its ability to lower cholesterol levels and reduce inflammation. The therapeutic actions of Athyrium deparioides include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Athyrium deparioides can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing digestive issues, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems.
